title: Is it possible to add timings to  the timeline
excerpt: When you enter the start time and finish time on a job it does not feature at all on the timeline. Would it be possible to add the ability to show timings on the timeline?

posts.author: Tregoning (Harry Tregoning)
posts.cookedHtml: When you enter the start time and finish time on a job it does not feature at all on the timeline. Would it be possible to add the ability to show timings on the timeline?
